approach: UVM-based constrained random with formal verification and directed tests

test_categories.name: basic_functionality
test_categories.description: Tests fundamental FIFO operations - write, read, reset

tests.name: test_reset
tests.description: Verify reset behavior clears all state

tests.name: test_single_write_read
tests.description: Single write followed by single read

tests.name: test_basic_fifo_order
tests.description: Verify FIFO ordering with sequential writes/reads

tests.name: test_empty_flag
tests.description: Verify empty flag behavior

tests.name: test_full_flag
tests.description: Verify full flag behavior

test_categories.name: status_flags
test_categories.description: Tests all status flag generation and timing

tests.name: test_almost_full_threshold
tests.description: Verify almost_full flag at 3/4 depth boundary

tests.name: test_almost_empty_threshold
tests.description: Verify almost_empty flag at 1/4 depth boundary

tests.name: test_count_accuracy
tests.description: Verify count reflects actual FIFO entries

tests.name: test_flag_transitions
tests.description: Test all valid flag state transitions

tests.name: test_conflicting_flags
tests.description: Ensure no conflicting flag states

test_categories.name: error_conditions
test_categories.description: Tests overflow, underflow, and error flag behavior

tests.name: test_overflow
tests.description: Write to full FIFO without read

tests.name: test_underflow
tests.description: Read from empty FIFO without write

tests.name: test_error_sticky
tests.description: Verify error flag remains set once triggered

tests.name: test_error_reset_only
tests.description: Verify only reset clears error flag

tests.name: test_simul_rw_full
tests.description: Simultaneous read/write when FIFO is full

tests.name: test_simul_rw_empty
tests.description: Simultaneous read/write when FIFO is empty

tests.name: test_simul_rw_normal
tests.description: Simultaneous read/write in normal state

tests.name: test_back_to_back_ops
tests.description: Rapid alternating read/write operations

test_categories.name: boundary_conditions
test_categories.description: Tests edge cases and boundary conditions

tests.name: test_pointer_wraparound
tests.description: Verify pointer wraparound at depth boundary

tests.name: test_threshold_boundaries
tests.description: Test exact threshold boundary conditions

tests.name: test_max_min_data
tests.description: Test with all 1s and all 0s data patterns

tests.name: test_rapid_fill_empty
tests.description: Continuous fill and empty cycles

test_categories.name: timing_and_reset
test_categories.description: Tests reset timing and clock edge behavior

tests.name: test_reset_during_write
tests.description: Reset assertion during active write

tests.name: test_reset_during_read
tests.description: Reset assertion during active read

tests.name: test_reset_timing
tests.description: Reset timing with various assertion/deassertion patterns

tests.name: test_combinational_read
tests.description: Verify rd_data is combinational

tests.name: test_min_depth
tests.description: Test with DEPTH=1

tests.name: test_power_of_2_depths
tests.description: Test with power-of-2 depths

tests.name: test_non_power_of_2_depths
tests.description: Test with non-power-of-2 depths

tests.name: test_various_data_widths
tests.description: Test with different DATA_WIDTH values

tests.name: test_random_operations
tests.description: Completely random read/write sequences

tests.name: test_burst_operations
tests.description: Burst writes followed by burst reads

tests.name: test_mixed_patterns
tests.description: Mixed deterministic and random patterns

tests.name: test_long_sequences
tests.description: Extended test sequences for corner case discovery

assertions.name: assert_no_overflow_write
assertions.description: Prevents writing to full FIFO without error
assertions.sva_template: property no_overflow; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (full && wr_en && !rd_en) |-> ##1 error; endproperty

assertions.name: assert_no_underflow_read
assertions.description: Prevents reading from empty FIFO without error
assertions.sva_template: property no_underflow; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (empty && rd_en && !wr_en) |-> ##1 error; endproperty

assertions.name: assert_count_bounds
assertions.sva_template: property count_bounds; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) count <= DEPTH; endproperty

assertions.name: assert_flag_consistency
assertions.description: Full and empty flags are mutually exclusive
assertions.sva_template: property flag_consistency; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) !(full && empty); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_empty_when_count_zero
assertions.description: Empty flag set when count is zero
assertions.sva_template: property empty_count; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (count == 0) <-> empty; endproperty

assertions.name: assert_full_when_count_depth
assertions.description: Full flag set when count equals DEPTH
assertions.sva_template: property full_count; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (count == DEPTH) <-> full; endproperty

assertions.name: assert_almost_full_threshold
assertions.description: Almost full flag behavior at threshold
assertions.sva_template: property almost_full_thresh; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (count >= (3*DEPTH/4)) <-> almost_full; endproperty

assertions.name: assert_almost_empty_threshold
assertions.description: Almost empty flag behavior at threshold
assertions.sva_template: property almost_empty_thresh; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (count <= (DEPTH/4)) <-> almost_empty; endproperty

assertions.name: assert_error_sticky
assertions.description: Error flag remains set once triggered
assertions.sva_template: property error_sticky; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) error |-> ##1 error; endproperty

assertions.name: assert_reset_state
assertions.description: Reset brings FIFO to known state

assertions.name: assert_data_integrity
assertions.sva_template: property data_integrity; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (wr_en && !full) |-> ##[1:DEPTH] (rd_en && !empty); endproperty

assertions.name: assert_fifo_progress
assertions.sva_template: property fifo_progress; @(posedge clk) disable iff (!rst_n) (wr_en || rd_en) |-> ##[1:2] (count != $past(count)); endproperty

covergroups.name: cg_status_flags
covergroups.description: Coverage of all status flag combinations

covergroups.name: cg_count_values
covergroups.description: Coverage of count values across full range

constrained_random: constraint valid_operations { wr_en dist {0:=30, 1:=70}; rd_en dist {0:=30, 1:=70}; }
directed_scenarios: Fill FIFO completely then empty completely
Write single entry, read single entry repeatedly
Burst write to almost_full, then single writes
Burst read to almost_empty, then single reads
Trigger overflow condition and verify error
Trigger underflow condition and verify error
Simultaneous operations at all threshold boundaries
Pointer wraparound scenarios with full/empty cycles
